title: cvxcla: A matrix-free Critical Line Algorithm for the mean-variance efficient frontier
description: Python implementation of Markowitz's Critical Line Algorithm, computing the entire mean-variance efficient frontier exactly through a matrix-free covariance-operator abstraction with structured backends (dense, incremental-inverse, diagonal-plus-low-rank factor, and data-matrix Gram), and supporting general linear equality constraints.
